series_metadata.series_description: All records concerning federal grants to state agencies which document the application, award, expenditure, use, and monitoring of federal monies.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: five years or state and federal audits have been conducted, corresponding audit reports released, audit resolutions issued or resolved, and in accordance with applicable federal regulations regarding retention and maintenance of records (see 2 CRF 200.334). ; Paper: five years or state and federal audits have been conducted, corresponding audit reports released, audit resolutions issued or resolved, and in accordance with applicable federal regulations regarding retention and maintenance of records (see 2 CRF 200.334)
